subcodes.first_line: In reply to Mirza Muhammad-'Ali Khan—upon him be God's loving-kindness—write: Praise be unto God! Through divine grace and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جواب میرزا محمد علی خان علیه عنایه الله بنویسید لله الحمد بعنایت الهی و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
